component.name: AppImage Manager
component.summary: Gestore di AppImage nativo per KDE

description.p: AppImage Manager integrates AppImages into KDE Plasma. When you click an AppImage in Dolphin, a confirmation dialog (kdialog) appears; on accept, the AppImage is copied into ~/.local/bin and a full KDE menu entry is created (icons + .desktop), then the application is launched.

AppImage Manager integra le AppImage in KDE Plasma. Quando fai click su un'AppImage in Dolphin appare una finestra di conferma (kdialog); se accetti, l'AppImage viene copiata in ~/.local/bin e viene creata la voce di menù di KDE (icone + .desktop), poi l'applicazione viene avviata.
Metadata is extracted directly from the AppImage squashfs payload via unsquashfs; the AppImage is never executed during install. Includes list and uninstall subcommands.

ul.li: The installed .desktop entry is now saved with a namespaced filename (appimage-manager-<name>.desktop) instead of <name>.desktop. This avoids a collision with the .desktop entry an AppImage exposes from its own mount point, which caused KDE Plasma to hide the menu entry.

The installer now ensures KDE picks up the menu entry when ~/.local/share is missing from XDG_DATA_DIRS (it rebuilds ksycoca with the correct path and shows a user-facing hint with the permanent fix).
Click-to-install via kdialog with KDE menu integration.
Metadata extraction from the squashfs payload (no AppImage execution).
